tasks.description: Add a strict-inductive B7 v2-plus-FreeAcc-Euler screening variant to run_baselines.py for T3 total-score evaluation, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-007 FR-009 FR-013 FR-014
tasks.acceptance: B7 variant is selectable without changing existing B0-B6 behavior, uses fold-local fitting through existing helpers, treats clinical labels only as targets, and reports required T3 metrics.

tasks.description: Run the B7 T3 5-fold screening experiment remotely and capture the result artifact, mapping FR-007 FR-009 FR-012 FR-015
tasks.acceptance: Remote run completes via the repository remote workflow, result JSON is produced under results/, and the screening result is clearly labeled exploratory rather than confirmatory.

tasks.description: Run B7 leakage and null sanity validation for label scrambling, subject-identity shuffle, canary feature, library exclusion, and transductive sanity checks, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-008 FR-013
tasks.acceptance: All required null or leakage checks pass or the candidate is marked invalid with fail-fast diagnostics and no confirmatory recommendation.

tasks.description: Compare B7 screening metrics against the honest T3 baseline and decide whether it is screening-positive, mapping FR-007 FR-009 FR-011 FR-015 SC-001 SC-002
tasks.acceptance: Comparison includes CCC, calibration slope, MAE, Pearson r, prediction variance, and sample count, with a continue or stop decision tied to predefined thresholds.

tasks.description: If B7 is screening-positive, create exactly one pre-registration record for confirmatory T3 LOOCV; otherwise record the negative result and close the FreeAcc-Euler candidate, mapping FR-010 FR-015 SC-003 SC-004 SC-005
tasks.acceptance: Either one pre-registration artifact exists for a single confirmation run, or a negative-result note records why the candidate is closed without repeated tuning.

tasks.description: Expose a fold-safe additive FreeAcc-Euler feature group from the existing cached feature data without changing default B1 v2-only behavior, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-007 FR-013 FR-014
tasks.acceptance: Default feature loading and B0-B6 behavior remain unchanged; the additive group is available only when explicitly requested; missing required columns fail fast; targeted loader tests or equivalent gate verification pass.

tasks.description: Add a strict-inductive B7 v2-plus-FreeAcc-Euler screening variant to run_baselines.py for T3 total-score evaluation, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-007 FR-009 FR-013 FR-014
tasks.acceptance: B7 is selectable by baseline id, reuses train-fold-only feature selection and LightGBM training, reports CCC calibration slope MAE Pearson r prediction variance and sample count, and does not alter B0-B6 outputs.

tasks.description: Add B7 support to the existing null-gate validation path using the repository leakage-check helpers, mapping FR-001 FR-002 FR-003 FR-008 FR-013
tasks.acceptance: B7 null validation uses existing scrambled-label and canary-feature helpers where applicable, records unsupported checks explicitly, and fails fast on invalid evaluation setup.

tasks.description: Run the B7 T3 5-fold screening experiment remotely and capture the exploratory result artifact, mapping FR-007 FR-009 FR-012 FR-015
tasks.acceptance: Remote run completes via the repository remote workflow, result JSON is produced under results/, no full local test suite is run, and the result is labeled exploratory screening.

tasks.description: Run B7 leakage and null sanity validation remotely and decide whether B7 is screening-positive using SC-002 thresholds, mapping FR-007 FR-008 FR-009 FR-011 FR-015 SC-001 SC-002
tasks.acceptance: Decision compares CCC calibration slope MAE Pearson r prediction variance and sample count against B1_v2_only; B7 is positive only if CCC reaches at least 0.35 or improves by at least 0.08 absolute CCC with no leakage-check failure.

approval.summary: Task-level drift verification found Phase 1 tasks 1.1 and 1.2 ALIGNED with the implementation: run_baselines.py exposes nl_/sv_/pa_/fq_/hr_ variability features excluding ext_/ix_, preserves B0-B6, and registers B7_v2_plus_variability using V2_PLUS_VAR with predict_b1_v2_only k=500. A verifier NEEDS_REVISION note was caused by req_coverage metadata gap (filesSearched=[] / files_touched empty), not by implementation drift; critic_sounding_board approved treating this as tooling metadata limitation and documenting it in retrospective.
